llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Deputy Manager - Application Technology Rinse-off
job.description: (A) Core Purpose Be responsible for building up application technology competences in rinse-off areas, especially bar soap and hair conditioning e.g. hair oils and shampoo. Lead and develop regional marketing concepts, support key customer projects based on identified business needs in South Asia Be responsible for technical training and support for BASF products portfolio in rinse-off application in South Asia (B) Main Responsibilities, Tasks Deliverables Lead and conduct the lab experiment on application formulation development of rinse-off solutions, including new application solutions and performance evaluation Support and work with regional marketing team to develop new marketing concepts, launch data of new products and promotion kits with target BASF portfolio Be responsible for regional technical support of BASF ingredients for rinse-off application in South Asia Analyze and document results, prepare technical reports and summaries for rinse-off projects Communicate/exchange technical know-how within region Competitor analysis, performance evaluation comparing with competitors Transfer the new technology and new products from global launch to South Asia Support innovation collaboration projects with key accounts in South Asia Support internal and external customer seminars / workshop / trainings and events Comply with regulations concerning safety, health, and environment (C) Key Interfaces G-EMP/R Global Development Projects Leaders G-EMP Regional/Local Market Development Team Local Sales Team Analytical team at BASF Innovation Campus Mumbai (D) Performance Measures New concept and application of new products according to identified rinse-off market needs Successfully implementation of marketing concepts and key customer projects Maintenance of lab instruments and safe working environment and support AT laboratory development following BASF EHS compliance (E) Key Competencies (G= General; L=Leadership) Demonstrate Customer Focus: L Communicate Effectively: G Collaborate for Achievement: L (F) Technical Competencies Technical Professional Knowledge: Chemistry / Applied Chemistry / Physical Chemistry / Cosmetics Formulation Experience, instrumental analysis, laboratory safety management, standard IT-applications (G) Minimum Education and Qualification Requirement Education: BSc or MSc in chemistry, cosmetic science or related area Working experience: MSc or BSc with 8+ years of working experience of personal care application technology in a...
